Enum Class AdminRequest.Category

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<AdminRequest.Category>
model.AdminRequest.Category
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<AdminRequest.Category>, Constable
Enclosing class:
AdminRequest
public static enum AdminRequest.Category extends Enum<AdminRequest.Category>
Available predefined request categories.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    ACCOUNT_MANAGEMENT
    Account modification actions (create, disable, update).
    CONTENT_MODERATION
    Issues involving inappropriate or problematic content.
    OTHER
    For requests not fitting a predefined category.
    PERMISSION_CHANGE
    Changes to user roles, privileges, or permissions.
    SYSTEM_CONFIGURATION
    System configuration updates or settings changes.
    TECHNICAL_ISSUE
    Technical problems requiring admin intervention.
    USER_SUPPORT
    General user assistance or support-related issues.
